description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered bottom and a standard aluminum pull-tab top. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its body, accompanied by a white wave design. On one side, the word 'Coke' is printed in large, bold white letters, while the opposite side features product information and a barcode. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard ring pull tab, and the surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of aluminum beverage cans. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can's graphics are crisp and clear. The can is empty, as indicated by its context as street trash, and would be lightweight and easily movable.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, a silver pull-tab top, and clear product labeling. The can is undamaged and features a smooth, reflective aluminum surface.
description_view_0: The can displays a large, partial 'Coke' logo in white on a red background, with the silver pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full Coca-Cola script logo in white, prominently displayed across the red can body.
description_view_2: The back of the can shows detailed product information in white text and a vertical barcode near the base.
description_view_3: The can again shows the 'Coke' logo, but from a different angle, with part of the barcode and product text visible on the side.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with a wave design on a red background, wrapping around the can.
attribute_label_text: Coca-Cola Trade-mark Coke Trade-mark CARBONATED WATER, HIGH FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP, CARAMEL COLOR, PHOSPHORIC ACID, NATURAL FLAVORS, CAFFEINE. CANNED UNDER AUTHORITY OF THE COCA-COLA COMPANY, ATLANTA, GA 30313 BY COCA-COLA BOTTLERS. COMPANY OF NEW YORK, INC. NEW YORK, N.Y. 11219
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label near the base.
